entities.name: GROWING POPULATION
entities.description: The increase in the global human population creating pressure on food and resources

entities.name: ENVIRONMENTAL DEGRADATION
entities.description: The deterioration of the environment through depletion of resources and destruction of ecosystems

entities.name: GLOBAL WARMING
entities.description: The long-term heating of Earth's climate system due to human activities

entities.name: URBANIZATION
entities.description: The process of population shift from rural to urban areas

entities.name: MALNUTRITION
entities.description: Lack of proper nutrition, caused by not having enough to eat or not eating enough of the right things

entities.name: CONSUMER PREFERENCES
entities.description: The tastes and preferences of consumers regarding food and agricultural products

entities.name: GLOBAL FOOD PRODUCTION
entities.description: The total amount of food produced worldwide to meet the needs of the population

entities.name: GLOBAL FOOD DEMAND
entities.description: The total requirement for food globally, driven by population growth

entities.name: DEVELOPING WORLD
entities.description: Regions of the world with lower industrialization and lower human development indices

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the Digital India initiative was launched

entities.name: DIGITAL INDIA
entities.description: A campaign launched by the Government of India to ensure government services are made available to citizens electronically

entities.name: DIGITAL INFRASTRUCTURE
entities.description: The foundational framework of digital technologies, connectivity, and hardware

entities.name: RURAL COMMUNITIES
entities.description: Populations living in non-urban, agricultural areas

entities.name: DIGITAL DELIVERY OF SERVICES
entities.description: The use of digital platforms and technologies to provide services to citizens

entities.name: DIGITAL LITERACY
entities.description: The ability to find, evaluate, and communicate information through various digital platforms

entities.name: FARMERS' INCOME
entities.description: The total earnings generated by farmers from their agricultural activities

entities.name: ECOLOGICAL AND RESOURCE CHALLENGES
entities.description: Environmental and resource-based constraints and pressures facing the agriculture sector
